---
format: html
title: read_spatial_model_results()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>read_spatial_model_results</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Read Spatial Model Results</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Reads successful spatial model ANOVA and evaluation targets from
indexed targets stores and returns one summary row per
store-resolution-component combination.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>read_spatial_model_results(
  store_index,
  resolution_ids,
  read_target_fn = targets::tar_read_raw,
  meta_fn = targets::tar_meta,
  require_non_empty = FALSE
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="store_index">store_index</code></td>
<td>
<p>Data frame returned by [build_spatial_model_store_index()].</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="resolution_ids">resolution_ids</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character vector of model resolution identifiers.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="read_target_fn">read_target_fn</code></td>
<td>
<p>Function used to read one target. Defaults to
[targets::tar_read_raw()].</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="meta_fn">meta_fn</code></td>
<td>
<p>Function used to read target metadata. Defaults to
[targets::tar_meta()].</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="require_non_empty">require_non_empty</code></td>
<td>
<p>Logical. If 'TRUE', error when no rows are read.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A tibble with ANOVA component percentages and AUC summaries.
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
